name: Vineland Boys
description: The Vineland Boys is a Hispanic street gang in the San Fernando Valley with approximately 300 members. Founded in January 1988 in Sun Valley by former 18th Street gang members, named after Vineland Avenue in North Hollywood. Initially clashed with the Mexican Mafia until founder Teddy Lopez was murdered by La Eme at a Monterey Park nightclub in 1998 — they then joined the Sureño coalition. In 2003, member David Garcia fatally shot Burbank Police Officer Matthew Pavelka, prompting 'Operation Silent Night' with 1,300 officers and 23 arrests. Allied with Armenian Power and the Israeli Abergil crime family (ecstasy trafficking). Ties to the Sinaloa Cartel were revealed during the Pavelka investigation.
